languages.original_text: "I support this action, Proctor. Perhaps we should discuss later how we might increase security measures on board — each within his own professional remit."

languages.text: "Поддерживаю эту меру, проктор. Возможно, нам стоит позже обсудить, как усилить меры безопасности — каждый со своей профессиональной стороны".
"I support this action, Proctor. Perhaps we should discuss later how we might increase security measures on board — each within his own professional remit."
languages.original_text: "Поддерживаю эту меру, проктор. Возможно, нам стоит позже обсудить, как усилить меры безопасности — каждый со своей профессиональной стороны".

traits.locale_text: "I support this action, Proctor. Perhaps we should discuss later how we might increase security measures on board — each within his own professional remit."
"I support this action, Proctor. Perhaps we should discuss later how we might increase security measures on board — each within his own professional remit."
"I support this action, Proctor. Perhaps we should discuss later how we might increase security measures on board — each within his own professional remit."

languages.text: 「この行動を支持します、プロクター。船内でのセキュリティ対策を強化する方法について、各自の専門分野の範囲内で、後で話し合う必要があるかもしれませんね。」
languages.original_text: "I support this action, Proctor. Perhaps we should discuss later how we might increase security measures on board — each within his own professional remit."

traits.locale_text: 「この行動を支持します、プロクター。船内でのセキュリティ対策を強化する方法について、各自の専門分野の範囲内で、後で話し合う必要があるかもしれませんね。」

languages.text: « J'approuve votre initiative, proctor. Nous devrions nous retrouver plus tard pour discuter des mesures à prendre afin de renforcer la sécurité à bord, chacun dans son propre domaine de compétence. »
languages.original_text: "I support this action, Proctor. Perhaps we should discuss later how we might increase security measures on board — each within his own professional remit."

traits.locale_text: « J'approuve votre initiative, proctor. Nous devrions nous retrouver plus tard pour discuter des mesures à prendre afin de renforcer la sécurité à bord, chacun dans son propre domaine de compétence. »

languages.text: "Ich unterstütze dieses Vorgehen, Proktor. Vielleicht sollten wir uns bei Gelegenheit über die Erhöhung der Sicherheitsmaßnahmen an Bord unterhalten ... in unserem jeweiligen Aufgabenbereich."
languages.original_text: "I support this action, Proctor. Perhaps we should discuss later how we might increase security measures on board — each within his own professional remit."

traits.locale_text: "Ich unterstütze dieses Vorgehen, Proktor. Vielleicht sollten wir uns bei Gelegenheit über die Erhöhung der Sicherheitsmaßnahmen an Bord unterhalten ... in unserem jeweiligen Aufgabenbereich."

languages.text: "Bu eylemi destekliyorum Üsteğmen. Belki daha sonra gemideki güvenlik önlemlerini herkesin kendi profesyonel yetki alanı dâhilinde nasıl artırabileceğimizi tartışabiliriz."
languages.original_text: "I support this action, Proctor. Perhaps we should discuss later how we might increase security measures on board — each within his own professional remit."

traits.locale_text: "Bu eylemi destekliyorum Üsteğmen. Belki daha sonra gemideki güvenlik önlemlerini herkesin kendi profesyonel yetki alanı dâhilinde nasıl artırabileceğimizi tartışabiliriz."

languages.text: «Concuerdo con su idea, procurador. Tal vez luego podamos discutir cómo reforzar las medidas de seguridad a bordo; dentro de nuestras respectivas competencias profesionales, claro está».
languages.original_text: "I support this action, Proctor. Perhaps we should discuss later how we might increase security measures on board — each within his own professional remit."

traits.locale_text: «Concuerdo con su idea, procurador. Tal vez luego podamos discutir cómo reforzar las medidas de seguridad a bordo; dentro de nuestras respectivas competencias profesionales, claro está».

languages.text: “我支持这项行动，监察官。或许我们稍后应该讨论一下，如何在各自的职责范围内加强舰船的安保措施。”
languages.original_text: "I support this action, Proctor. Perhaps we should discuss later how we might increase security measures on board — each within his own professional remit."

traits.locale_text: “我支持这项行动，监察官。或许我们稍后应该讨论一下，如何在各自的职责范围内加强舰船的安保措施。”
